message:
feat: add Hermes Agent connector for SQLite session storage (#5)

Adds a new feature-gated connector for Hermes Agent
(https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent), a multi-platform
coding agent that stores sessions in SQLite at $HERMES_HOME/state.db.

- Reads sessions and messages from Hermes's SQLite schema
- Handles REAL unix timestamps (seconds with fractional precision)
- Parses tool_calls JSON column into NormalizedInvocations
- Infers workspace from terminal workdir and file path tool calls
- Supports compression chains via parent_session_id metadata
- Skips session_meta role records (metadata, not conversation content)
- Feature-gated behind `hermes` (requires rusqlite + urlencoding)
- Added to `all-connectors` feature set

Closes #5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,10 +58,12 @@ cursor = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
 opencode = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
 # Goose: SQLite database access for Goose sessions.db
 goose = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
+# Hermes: SQLite database access for Hermes Agent state.db
+hermes = ["connectors", "dep:rusqlite", "dep:urlencoding"]
 # Crush: SQLite database access for Charm's Crush agent (uses frankensqlite)
 crush = ["connectors", "dep:frankensqlite"]
 # All connectors enabled
-all-connectors = ["connectors", "chatgpt", "cursor", "opencode", "goose", "crush"]
+all-connectors = ["connectors", "chatgpt", "cursor", "opencode", "goose", "hermes", "crush"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 tempfile = "3"
